transcript: Now, during your course of time while you are in the universe, there are a few incidents which define a certain before and a certain after. And while you're on the threshold of this before and after, is when life is actually happening. And people don't tell you how difficult seventh grade can get at times. Seventh grade is actually really difficult. You're dealing with a completely new curriculum. Uh, you're dealing with a period for the first time. You're dealing with confessing to a crush for the first time. But the most difficult of them all, dealing with the death of a parent. Now, most of us will have to face the death of a parent, but only a few are actually prepared for it.
